tools.name: ctx_podman_ps
tools.description: List all Podman containers including stopped ones.

tools.name: ctx_podman_logs
tools.description: Show logs from a Podman container.

tools.name: ctx_podman_images
tools.description: List Podman images with repository, tag, and size.

tools.name: ctx_podman_inspect
tools.description: Show detailed information about a Podman container.
tools.command: podman inspect {{.container}} | jq '.[0] | {Id: .Id, Name: .Name, State: .State.Status, Image: .ImageName, Ports: .NetworkSettings.Ports, Mounts: [.Mounts[].Destination]}'
